title: Acianthera spicata
taxonomy: Acianthera spicata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Acianthera, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids. The genus Acianthera is further divided into several subgenera, and A. spicata is part of one of these subgroups. At the higher taxonomic levels, A. spicata is classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae and the order Asparagales. This classification system is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its morphology and genetic makeup.
